Biography
Birth and Early Life
William Wardwell was born about 1607 in England as the first of two children to Lascelle Wardell and to an unknown mother.

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wardell於1607年1月4日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾阿福德時，他的父親John Wardwell45歲，母親Margareta Marshall35歲。他於1636年與Alice Pyce在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1633年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓且於1649年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯。他於1661年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓被列為tavern keeper。他去世於1670年4月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Wardell于1607年1月4日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾阿福德时，他的父亲John Wardwell45岁，母亲Margareta Marshall35岁。他于1636年与Alice Pyce在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1633年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓且于1649年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯。他于1661年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓被列为tavern keeper。他去世于1670年4月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wardell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern England, especially East Yorkshire): variant of   Wardle  .

variants.name: Wardle
meanings: habitational name from Wardle in Lancashire and possibly Wardle in Cheshire, both named with Old English weard-hyll ‘watch hill’. Compare Warden 2 and Wardlaw .
habitational name from Weardale (Durham), which takes its name from the river Wear (related to the Indo-European root wis-, weis- ‘liquid, flow’ or wedōr- ‘water’) + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Historical Boundaries: 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

Historical Boundaries: 1642:  Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1653: Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1680: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

en.lifeSummary: When William Wardell was born on 4 January 1607, in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Wardwell, was 45 and his mother, Margareta Marshall, was 35. He married Alice Pyce in 1636, in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1633 and Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1649. In 1661, his occupation is listed as tavern keeper in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. He died on 25 April 1670, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Wardell est né le 4 janvier 1607, à Alford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wardwell, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margareta Marshall, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Alice Pyce en 1636, à Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1633 et à Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1649. En 1661, sa profession de son indiquée est tavern keeper à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 25 avril 1670, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Wardell am 4. Januar 1607 in Alford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wardwell 45 und seine Mutter Margareta Marshall 35. Er hat 1636 in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Alice Pyce geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1633 hat er in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1649 in Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. 1661 ist sein Beruf als tavern keeper in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. April 1670 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Wardell è nato il il 4 gennaio 1607 nel Alford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Wardwell, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Margareta Marshall, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Alice Pyce nel 1636, nel Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1633 e nel Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1649. Nel 1661, la sua occupazione è indicata come tavern keeper nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Morì il 25 aprile 1670, nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Wardellが1607年1月4日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアアルフォードで生まれた時，父John Wardwellは45歳，母Margareta Marshallは35歳であった。1636年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストンでAlice Pyceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1633年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストンに，1649年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエルズに住んでいた。1661年，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンでの職業はtavern keeperと記録されている。彼は1670年4月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンで63歳で死去した。

ko.Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴
ko.lifeSummary: William Wardell(이)가 1607년 1월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 알퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wardwell(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margareta Marshall(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1636년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴에서 Alice Pyce(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1633년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴에서, 1649년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스에서 살았다. 1661년, 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 tavern keeper이었다. 그는 1670년 4월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Wardell nasceu em 4 de janeiro de 1607, em Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wardwell, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margareta Marshall, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Pyce em 1636, em Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1633 e em Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1649. Em 1661, sua profissão aparece como tavern keeper em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 25 de abril de 1670, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Wardell родился 4 января 1607 г. в местности алфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Wardwell было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margareta Marshall, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Pyce в 1636 г. в местности бостон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности бостон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1633 году и в местности веллс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1649 году. В 1661 году он работал по профессии tavern keeper в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 25 апреля 1670 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Wardell nació el 4 de enero de 1607, en Alford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Wardwell, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margareta Marshall, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Alice Pyce en 1636, en Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1633 y en Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1649. En 1661, su ocupación registrada era tavern keeper en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Murió el 25 de abril de 1670, en Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
